narrative:
Bellbrook-Sugarcreek Local Sd school district has 14,234 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -4.9% D−R vs -36.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
